headline: Student Visa Fraud Uncovered at 14 Private Institutions in 2025
context: Immigration Department investigations revealed 14 private colleges acting as visa mills for 8,200 foreign students.

cards.big: 14 private colleges used as visa mills for 8,200 foreign students in 2025 raids
cards.sub: Students enrolled on paper but worked illegally in restaurants and factories

cards.big: EMGS approved 185,000 student visas in 2025 but verified attendance for only 62%
cards.sub: Monitoring gaps allow institutions to maintain phantom enrollment rolls

cards.big: Affected institutions collected estimated RM49 million in tuition from non-attending students
cards.sub: Business model relies on visa facilitation fees not educational delivery

cards.big: Australia deregistered 32 visa-mill institutions in 2024 under strengthened ESOS framework
cards.sub: Swift deregistration with student protection measures set a regulatory precedent

cards.big: Visa-mill colleges damage Malaysia's reputation as a legitimate education destination
Should student visa approval require verified attendance records not just enrollment letters
